green_light_conditions: no unsupported partner or approval claim needed
red_light_conditions: concept requires patient data or clinical claims
budget or terms need unauthorised acceptance
public artifact used as unsupported application evidence
fast_decision_questions: Am I personally inside the A4 UM compulsory service target group today
Can my current institution be named in a pre application
Do I have TBYS access in the correct role for this call
Is there any institutional approval step before TBYS
Does the concept remain fully non patient data
Can the budget be left blank, minimal, or institutionally reviewed before entry
If TUSEB does not answer, do we still have enough official route certainty to continue
minimum_concept_scope: Turkish medical LLM failure mode capture using public or synthetic examples
source support checks for clinical claims
health data quality and label audit worksheet
human review protocol for non deployment evaluation
current_decision: eligibility and authority closure, not TBYS action
